self = <workflows.api.students_api_flows.StudentsApiFlows object at 0x0000026B23381160>
word_to_verify = 'Tom'

    @allure.title("Verify creating a student and check via Gemini AI")
    @allure.description(
        "Verify that creating a new student returns 201 and that the response contains the expected word using Gemini AI."
    )
    def verify_create_student_with_gemini(self, word_to_verify: str):
        # ----------------------------
        # 1️⃣ יוצרים סטודנט חדש
        # ----------------------------
        payload = {
            "firstName": "Tom",
            "lastName": "Lev",
            "email": "tom.partial@example.com",
            "programme": "Math"
        }
    
        response = self.api.post(STUDENTS_BASE_URL, payload=payload)
        expected_status = 201
        actual_status = response.status
        assert actual_status == expected_status, f"Expected {expected_status}, got {actual_status}"
        student_data = response.json()
        print("Created student:", student_data)
    
        # ----------------------------
        # 2️⃣ שולחים את הנתונים ל-Gemini AI לבדיקה
        # ----------------------------
        client = genai.Client(api_key=GEMINI_API_KEY)
        prompt = f"""
        קיבלת רשימת סטודנט בפורמט JSON:
    
        {json.dumps(student_data, indent=2)}
    
        בדוק אם המילה '{word_to_verify}' קיימת בערכים.
        ענה רק בפורמט הבא:
        Word Found: Yes או No
        """
    
        response_ai = client.models.generate_content(
            model="gemini-2.5-flash",
            contents=prompt
        )
    
        result_text = response_ai.text
        print("Gemini AI result:", result_text)
    
        # ----------------------------
        # 3️⃣ Assertion
        # ----------------------------
>       assert "yes" in result_text.lower(), f"The word '{word_to_verify}' was not found in the response!"
